title: Inheritance, MRO, Super, and Mixins · Behavior Case: Oop Inheritance Is A
summary: Evaluate extension designs for physical, digital, and restricted library resources. Planned artifact: Add and verify the oop inheritance is a increment in an extensible resource type hierarchy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use inheritance when a subtype preserves the semantic contract and reusable implementation of its base type.
Move decisions toward objects that own relevant information without creating command-heavy anemic or god objects.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
